title: inventory.session.review
description: Session-scoped wrapper around lifecycle.transition (spec 002) for the Inventory surface. Pre-fills entity_type based on the session kind resolved server-side from session_id. Returns a status-discriminated response: success (transition applied), noop (state unchanged, no audit entry), or error.

ResolvedEntityType.description: Resolved server-side from session_id; included in the response so audit correlation is unambiguous.

SessionState.description: Canonical spec 002 six-value session state. Used for both next_state (request) and new_state/prior_state (response). No presentational projection.

message.description: Human-readable explanation. MUST NOT include absolute filesystem paths or secrets.

details.description: Optional structured detail. Examples: { allowed_next_states: [...] } for transition.refused; { source_state: 'missing' } for source.unavailable; {} for session.mixed_state (user must split via spec 005 reclassify).

Request.description: Request envelope for inventory.session.review. Caller supplies the session id and target canonical state; the server resolves the entity_type and delegates to lifecycle.transition.

next_state.description: Canonical spec 002 session state to transition to. When next_state equals current state, the response is status='noop' (no audit entry, no error). The state.unchanged error code is not used.

action_label.description: Human-readable label recorded on the audit entry (e.g. 'Confirmed', 'Re-opened review', 'Rejected session').

Response.description: Response envelope for inventory.session.review. Status is 'success' (transition applied), 'noop' (no change needed, no audit entry), or 'error'.
